data.title: 国际服网页活动「Becoming Santa!」

data.body:
[Web Event Notice]

Sensei, this new event named 'Becoming Santa!' begins today!
Please log in to enjoy the event and get tons of goodies, including Pyroxenes!

🗓️Event Period: 6/13 (Tue) 3:00 ~ 6/27 (Tue) 1:59 (UTC)
